query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW public.votos_por_provincia AS
SELECT 
  provincia,
  voto_generales as partido,
  COUNT(*) as votos
FROM public.respuestas
WHERE provincia IS NOT NULL 
  AND voto_generales IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY provincia, voto_generales
ORDER BY provincia, votos DESC;
